title: Implement SSO for Enterprise Customers
description:
Enable single sign-on authentication for our SaaS platform, allowing enterprise customers to log in using their corporate identity provider (Azure AD, Okta, or Google Workspace).

This feature will eliminate the need for separate credentials, reduce password-related support tickets, and meet enterprise security requirements.
acceptance_criteria:
- Users can log in via Azure AD, Okta, or Google Workspace
- Existing accounts are linked by email during SSO onboarding
- SSO is mandatory for enterprise tier, optional for self-serve
- Admin console shows SSO configuration status
